sections.paragraph: δέρω [cp. δέρμα; ‘remove hide, flay, skin’] in NT only in transferred sense mistreat/punish in a violent manner, subject to rendering by various glosses derived from context beat (up) Mt 21:35; Mk 12:3, 5; 13:9; Lk 20:10f; whip, lash, flog Ac 5:40; 16:37; 22:19; Lk 12:47 δαρήσεται πολλάς he will receive many lashes, conversely δ. ολίγας vs. 48; hit, strike 22:63; J 18:23; the air 1 Cor 9:26; 2 Cor 11:20.
